news.headline: Trump personally invites Xi Jinping to attend inauguration on 12/12/2024, reported by CBS and Bloomberg.
news.summary: In a recent update on the global economy, it was reported that the GDP growth rate for the United States in the last quarter was 6.4%, surpassing expectations. This growth was driven largely by strong consumer spending and business investments. On the other hand, the Eurozone saw a decrease in their GDP by 0.6%, impacted by continued lockdown measures. In terms of employment, the US added 900,000 jobs in the same quarter, leading to a decrease in the unemployment rate to 5.8%. In contrast, the Eurozone experienced a rise in unemployment to 8.1%. These contrasting economic performances are reflective of the ongoing challenges faced by different regions amidst the global pandemic.

news.headline: Romania and Bulgaria granted full access to EU's passport-free area, a historic step for the countries.
SNB's Chairman Schlegel: We take into consideration what other central banks are doing, but the focus is on Switzerland.
SNB reduces key rate by 0.50 points.
atNorth appoints Director of People & Culture and Director of Sustainability to support expansion in Reykjavík, Iceland.
news.summary: AtNorth, a prominent Nordic colocation and high-performance computing company, has recently expanded its workforce by hiring a Director of People & Culture and a Director of Sustainability. This move comes as part of the company's ongoing growth strategy. The appointments were made in Reykjavík, Iceland on December 12, 2024. The company aims to further strengthen its operations with these key personnel additions.

news.headline: SNB's Chairman Schlegel: We can tolerate a weakening of inflation below 0-2% target range, as long as it is temporary.
PUMA opens Studio48 in Herzogenaurach, Germany for designers to innovate. The hub spans 500 sqm; aims to elevate the brand.
news.summary: PUMA, the sports company, has launched Studio48, a creative hub situated at its headquarters in Herzogenaurach, Germany. This innovative space is designed for PUMA designers and creatives to collaborate on fresh ideas, develop concepts for new performance and Sportstyle products, and create campaigns. Studio48, spanning over 500 square meters (5,300 square feet), is integral to PUMA's growth strategy focusing on enhancing the brand's reputation. Through this initiative, PUMA aims to foster sustainability and innovation within the company.

news.headline: SNB's Chairman Schlegel: This step is intended to steady inflation between 0 and 2%.
Bitcoin futures basis reaches staggering 15% as price hits record high daily close, poised to surpass all-time peak soon.
news.summary: Investors are steering clear of leveraged Bitcoin bets following multiple failures. Despite this caution, Bitcoin's price is expected to surpass its previous record highs in a matter of days.

news.headline: SNB's Chairman Schlegel: Our main instrument is the policy rate, and with that, we can influence the economy and exchange rate.
Galaxis boosts online community building with dual staking programs: Governance Staking & Engine Superlock for Web3.
news.summary: The latest features introduced by the Web3 SocialFi platform include Governance Staking and the Engine Superlock programs, integrating community voting influence with incentives for users.

news.headline: SNB's Chairman Schlegel: We still have ammunition left on rates.
SNB's Chairman Schlegel: Inflation pressure in the medium term has declined.
SNB's Chairman Schlegel: We already said further rate cuts might be needed.
IEA: Current balances indicate a 950k BPD supply overhang in 2025 if OPEC+ starts unwinding voluntary cuts from the end of March 2025.
SPIC participates in 7th China International Import Expo to deepen international cooperation and promote energy transformation.
news.summary: Enhancing global collaboration and advancing energy transition in Shanghai, China, the 7th China International Import Expo (CIIE) took place in Shanghai from November 5 to 10, 2024. At this event, four subsidiaries of SPIC signed significant deals involving major equipment and materials. This event focused on boosting international cooperation and driving energy transformation.

news.headline: Incoming Macao chief executive Sam Hou Fai vows to uphold 'one country, two systems', ensuring steady implementation in Macao.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, in Beijing, it was announced that Sam Hou Fai would be taking on the role of chief executive in Macao. As the incoming chief executive, he will play a crucial role in ensuring the continued and stable implementation of the "one country, two systems" policy in Macao. This policy is vital for maintaining the unique governance structure of Macao. The appointment of Sam Hou Fai highlights the significance of this position and underscores the importance of effective leadership in upholding this policy.

HP report reveals security gaps in devices at every stage, highlighting cybersecurity risks for organizations.
news.summary: A recent report from HP emphasizes the critical importance of securing devices at all stages of their lifecycle to prevent cybersecurity threats. The report sheds light on the widespread implications of not properly securing devices, with statistics showing that around 68% of organizations have experienced endpoint attacks that have successfully breached their defenses. Additionally, it reveals that a staggering 80% of IT professionals believe that endpoint devices are at a higher risk now than they were just two years ago. This underscores the urgent need for organizations to prioritize device security measures throughout their lifecycle to mitigate cyber risks effectively.

news.headline: SkiStar AB to release First Quarter 2024/25 Interim Report on Dec 19 at 07:00 AM CET, followed by conference call with CEO and CFO.
news.summary: SkiStar AB is set to release its Interim Report for the period between September 1, 2024, and November 30, 2024, on Thursday, December 19, 2024, at 07:00 a.m. CET. For this occasion, SkiStar will conduct a conference call alongside a web presentation. CEO Stefan Sjöstrand and CFO Martin Almgren will lead the presentation, providing insights and analysis of the report. Attendees will have the opportunity to ask questions, either through phone calls or by email during the web presentation. The entire presentation will be conducted in English to cater to a wider audience.

news.headline: SNB Chairman states: Today's cut prevented a lower inflation forecast.
Sopra Steria study on tech graduates' expectations for future jobs reveals interest in AI, quantum computing, Green IT. Emphasis on work-life balance.
news.summary: Sopra Steria has released a study for the second year in a row focusing on the expectations of technology graduates regarding their future employers. The study reveals a keen interest in AI, quantum computing, and Green IT practices among the graduates. Additionally, the importance of work-life balance is emphasized as a top priority. This study sheds light on the preferences and priorities of tech graduates as they enter the workforce.

news.headline: Aon and EBRD launch $110m guarantee scheme for war risk insurance in Ukraine, adding to $465m capital support.
news.summary: Aon is enhancing its support for Ukraine's economy and insurance sector, as well as its readiness for reconstruction. This initiative signifies over $465 million in public and private funding for war risk insurance. The European Bank for Reconstruction and Development (EBRD) is introducing a new €110 million guarantee program to offer reinsurance capacity for this purpose.

news.headline: MYCOM OSI and Globe win 2024 Telecom Review Leaders' Summit Excellence Award for Most Innovative Product/Service for Automation.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, MYCOM OSI, a prominent company delivering Network Assurance and Service Experience Assurance tools to major communications service providers, was chosen to work with Globe, a leading provider in the industry. This collaboration signifies an important milestone for MYCOM OSI, reinforcing its position in the market.

news.headline: Yasmina Hayek named MENA's Best Female Chef 2025 by MENA's 50 Best Restaurants in Abu Dhabi.
news.summary: In London on December 12, 2024, Yasmina Hayek, the executive chef of Em Sherif restaurant group, has been honored as the Best Female Chef in the Middle East & North Africa for 2025. She will be presented with the award at the upcoming MENA's 50 Best Restaurants event in Abu Dhabi.

news.headline: AI-powered speech-to-text tech is revolutionizing industries, boosting efficiency, and fueling growth in sectors with innovative applications. Learn more.
news.summary: Learn about the significant impact of AI-powered speech-to-text technology on industries, leading to improved efficiency and business growth. Explore its innovative applications in different sectors to understand its transformative potential. Find out more about this game-changing technology by diving into the details.

news.headline: HKMA issues warning on fake Nanyang Commercial Bank site. Public urged to be cautious against phishing. Don't share personal info.
news.summary: The public has been alerted by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority regarding a deceptive website and online banking login page associated with Nanyang Commercial Bank. They advise vigilance to prevent falling victim to phishing schemes.

news.headline: Siemens and Roboverse Reply automate inspection processes with mobile robots in industrial environments. Leveraging COMOS Mobile Worker app, technicians can now automate maintenance tasks using autonomous mobile robots and drones.
news.summary: In Turin, Italy, Roboverse Reply, a specialist in robotics integration, has collaborated with Siemens to create a comprehensive AI-driven inspection solution for industrial settings. By utilizing Siemens' "COMOS Mobile Worker" app, companies can efficiently plan and carry out service technicians' tasks. This partnership enables technicians to automate intricate maintenance operations in industrial environments through the deployment of autonomous mobile robots (AMRs) and drones. This collaboration marks a significant advancement in enhancing productivity and efficiency in industrial maintenance processes, with the potential to revolutionize the sector.

news.headline: Owkin explores opportunities & challenges for digital pathology & AI solutions in healthcare in US, UK, & France. Reported by Censuswide.
news.summary: In Paris, Owkin, a leading AI-biotech company utilizing advanced AI for precision drug discovery and diagnostics, has released a new report titled "State of the Nation: Opportunities and Challenges for Digital Pathology and AI Solutions." The report delves into the changing scenario of digital pathology and AI applications in healthcare in the United States, United Kingdom, and France. In collaboration with Censuswide, the research underscores the hurdles faced by pathologists in this field.
